headline: 2026 Ascend A-List Awards: Honoring Business Leaders Shaping the Future
summary: The Ascend Foundation proudly hosts its annual A-List Awards, recognizing a distinguished group of global executives whose leadership is shaping industries, uplifting communities, and advancing opportunity at scale. More than a celebration, this annual benefit gala is the organization's most important night of the year—an exclusive gathering of influential leaders, partners, and supporters committed to building a more inclusive future.

content.title: 2026 Ascend A-List Awards: Honoring Business Leaders Shaping the Future
content.summary: The Ascend Foundation proudly hosts its annual A-List Awards, recognizing a distinguished group of global executives whose leadership is shaping industries, uplifting communities, and advancing opportunity at scale. More than a celebration, this annual benefit gala is the organization's most important night of the year—an exclusive gathering of influential leaders, partners, and supporters committed to building a more inclusive future.

thumbnail.caption: Ascend is powered by a network of accomplished professionals and executives from Fortune 500 companies who generously volunteer their time in order to advance the state of API equity at work. We develop, support, and empower Pan-Asians throughout their careers with a network for growth and advancement that enables our members to serve our vibrant communities to the best of their abilities. (PRNewsfoto/Ascend, Inc.)

headline: JNJ Stock’s 60% Breakout: Why Wall Street is Torn
summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) stock is up 62% over the last twelve months. For a healthcare giant typically filed under "boring and defensive," that's unusual. The move reflects a combination of a leaner post-spinoff business and fundamentals that have reframed J&J from a slow-moving conglomerate into a focused, high-quality compounder.
